title: agent2go Model Config
description: Schema for model configuration files in the a2go registry

id.description: Unique model ID in provider/name format (lowercase)

group.description: Group key — models with the same group become variants of the same UI card

family.description: Family key — models with the same family are siblings (used for alternative bit-level suggestions)

engine.description: Engine to use for this model

files.description: Files to download from the repo

downloadDir.description: Directory to download model files to (must start with /workspace/models/)

downloadMode.description: Download mode: 'files' for individual files, 'repo' for full snapshot

servedAs.description: Model name exposed via the API (for LLM models)

model.description: VRAM for model weights in MB

overhead.description: VRAM overhead in MB (compute buffers, etc.)

kvCacheMbPer1kTokens.description: KV cache VRAM per 1k context tokens in MB (with q8_0 quantization)

startDefaults.description: Default values for start argument templates

extraStartArgs.description: Additional CLI arguments appended to start command

mmproj.description: Multimodal projection file for vision-capable models (downloaded from same repo)

bits.description: Quantization bit depth of the primary (GGUF) weights

default.description: Whether this is the default model for its type

tps.description: Generation tokens/sec benchmarks per GPU (keys = GPU IDs from registry/gpus/)

verifiedOn.description: List of GPUs this model has been verified on

verifiedContext.description: Context length (tokens) used during TPS verification — documents the exact context the benchmarks were measured at

platform.description: Target platform (e.g., mlx for Apple Silicon)
